category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Azerbaijan AZSTAND conformity, AZS/IEC standards, and energy programme requirements.

title.en: China-to-Azerbaijan Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入阿塞拜疆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入亞塞拜然：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Azerbaijan AZSTAND mandatory conformity, AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standards, EMC requirements, national energy programmes, refrigerant (R-600a) handling, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与阿塞拜疆AZSTAND强制合格评定、AZS/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、电磁兼容要求、国家能效计划、制冷剂（R-600a）处理及在地进口商义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與亞塞拜然AZSTAND強制合格評定、AZS/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、電磁相容要求、國家能效計畫、製冷劑（R-600a）處理及在地進口商義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Azerbaijani legislation, AZS/IEC standards, AZSTAND conformity procedures, energy programme thresholds, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿塞拜疆法律、AZS/IEC标准、AZSTAND合格评定程序、能效计划门槛值及进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行亞塞拜然法律、AZS/IEC標準、AZSTAND合格評定程序、能效計畫門檻值及進口商義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Azerbaijan compliance gaps: (1) mandatory conformity confirmation under the AZSTAND (State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control) regime — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not directly accepted, and electrical safety must be demonstrated against AZS/IEC 60335-2-24; (2) Azerbaijan is NOT an EAEU member and operates a national conformity regime, so EAC marking does not substitute for AZSTAND conformity; (3) EMC demonstration against IEC/CISPR-based AZS standards; (4) energy efficiency declaration under national energy programmes; (5) appointment of an in-country importer or responsible representative for customs clearance and conformity. The genuine advantage: Azerbaijan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China's nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz, so no re-engineering for voltage or frequency is required. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临多项阿塞拜疆合规差距：（1）AZSTAND（反垄断与消费市场监管国家局）制度下的强制合格评定确认——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被直接接受，电气安全须依据AZS/IEC 60335-2-24证明；（2）阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员国，实行国家合格评定制度，故EAC标志不能替代AZSTAND合格评定；（3）依据基于IEC/CISPR的AZS标准进行电磁兼容证明；（4）依据国家能效计划进行能效声明；（5）委任在地进口商或责任代表负责清关与合格评定。真正的优势：阿塞拜疆220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国标称220/380 V 50 Hz一致，故无需为电压或频率重新设计。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨多項亞塞拜然合規差距：（1）AZSTAND（反壟斷與消費市場監管國家局）制度下的強制合格評定確認——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被直接接受，電氣安全須依據AZS/IEC 60335-2-24證明；（2）亞塞拜然非EAEU成員國，實行國家合格評定制度，故EAC標誌不能替代AZSTAND合格評定；（3）依據基於IEC/CISPR的AZS標準進行電磁相容證明；（4）依據國家能效計畫進行能效聲明；（5）委任在地進口商或責任代表負責清關與合格評定。真正的優勢：亞塞拜然220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國標稱220/380 V 50 Hz一致，故無需為電壓或頻率重新設計。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合AZS/IEC 60335-2-24要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
